
> Task :app:dependencies

------------------------------------------------------------
Project ':app'

|    \--- org.checkerframework:checker-qual:3.12.0

|    \--- org.checkerframework:checker-qual:3.12.0

\--- junit:junit:4.13.2
     \--- org.hamcrest:hamcrest-core:1.3
